title: [Proposal] Add pre-approval proposal editing with revision history and immutable approval snapshot
prompt:
[PROPOSAL EXECUTION] Executing approved proposal.

⚠️ CRITICAL — SRC EDIT TOOLS: You MUST use src-specific tools for ALL src/ edits.
Do NOT use find_replace, replace_lines, create_file, or write_file for src/ paths — those
resolve to workspace, not src/, and will FAIL with "file not found". Use ONLY:
  • read_source(file, start_line?, num_lines?)               — read src/ file
  • list_source(path?)                                       — list src/ dir
  • grep_source(pattern, path?)                              — search src/
  • find_replace_source(file, find, replace)                 — text swap
  • replace_lines_source(file, start_line, end_line, new_content) — line edit
  • insert_after_source(file, after_line, content)           — insert lines
  • delete_lines_source(file, start_line, end_line)          — delete lines
  • write_source(file, content, overwrite?)                  — create/overwrite src file
TITLE: Add pre-approval proposal editing with revision history and immutable approval snapshot
PRIORITY: high
TYPE: feature_addition
SUMMARY: Introduce explicit edit support for pending proposals only, with audit-safe revision tracking and a locked snapshot at approval time. This removes the need to replace proposals just to refine details before human decision.
FULL IMPLEMENTATION PLAN:
## Why this change
- Current behavior supports create/approve/deny but has no in-place edit path for pending proposals, which forces superseding proposals for small refinements.
- Raul explicitly requested the ability to modify unapproved proposals first-class, before approval.
- Source evidence:
  - `src/gateway/routes/proposals.router.ts` currently exposes list/get/approve/deny routes only (see route blocks around lines 29-239).
  - `src/gateway/proposals/proposal-store.ts` has create/load/save and status transitions but no revisioned update API for pending proposals (lines 137-260).
  - `src/gateway/tools/defs/cis-system.ts` defines `write_proposal` but no tool for editing pending proposals (tool definitions around lines 226+).

## Exact source edits
- `src/gateway/proposals/proposal-store.ts` (around existing Proposal type + CRUD section):
  - Extend `Proposal` with revision metadata:
    - `version: number` (starts at 1)
    - `revisionHistory?: Array<{version:number; editedAt:number; editedBy?:string; summary:string; fieldsChanged:string[]}>`
    - `approvalSnapshot?: { takenAt:number; proposal:any }`
  - Add `updatePendingProposal(id, patch, opts)` that:
    - Loads proposal and hard-fails unless status is exactly `pending`
    - Applies whitelisted field patches (title/summary/details/priority/affectedFiles/diffPreview/estimatedImpact/requiresBuild/requiresSrcEdit/executorAgentId/executorPrompt/notes)
    - Re-runs src-section validation when affectedFiles include `src/`
    - Increments `version`, appends revisionHistory entry, saves proposal
  - Update `createProposal` to initialize `version=1` and empty `revisionHistory`.
  - Update `approveProposal` to persist immutable `approvalSnapshot` (full resolved proposal content at decision time) before status moves to approved.

- `src/gateway/routes/proposals.router.ts` (new endpoint additions near existing proposal routes):
  - Add `PATCH /api/proposals/:id` endpoint:
    - Accepts `patch`, `editSummary`, `editedBy`
    - Calls `updatePendingProposal`
    - Returns updated proposal
    - Emits WS event `proposal_updated` with id/title/version/sessionId
  - Add route-level guard/error mapping:
    - 409 for non-pending edit attempts
    - 400 for invalid patch or missing src required sections
  - Keep approve/deny behavior unchanged except proposal objects now include version/snapshot fields.

- `src/gateway/tools/defs/cis-system.ts` (tool catalog section near `write_proposal`):
  - Add new tool definition `edit_proposal`:
    - Params: `proposal_id`, `patch`, `edit_summary`, `edited_by`
    - Description explicitly states: only works while proposal is pending; approved/denied/executing proposals are immutable.

- `src/gateway/agents-runtime/subagent-executor.ts` (tool switch for proposal tools):
  - Implement `edit_proposal` case:
    - Calls proposal-store update function
    - Returns structured success payload `{proposal_id, status, version, updated_fields}` or conflict error for non-pending.

## Deterministic behavior after patch
- Happy path:
  - Pending proposal can be edited in place via API/tool.
  - Version increments each edit and revision metadata is appended.
  - UI and right-column refresh receive `proposal_updated` event and reflect latest content.
- Edge cases:
  - If patch introduces/changes `src/` affected files, details are revalidated for required headings; invalid edits are rejected.
  - No-op patch returns unchanged content with explicit no-change indicator (or 400 based on final implementation choice, but deterministic and documented).
- Error handling:
  - Editing non-pending proposal returns 409 conflict with clear message.
  - Unknown proposal id returns 404.
- Explicit non-changes:
  - Existing create/approve/deny flows remain intact.
  - Approved execution dispatch flow remains unchanged.
  - Existing proposals without version fields remain readable; migration handled lazily at load/update (default `version=1`).

## Acceptance tests
1. API edit success:
   - Create proposal, call `PATCH /api/proposals/:id` with new summary/details.
   - Expect 200, `status=pending`, `version` incremented, `revisionHistory` appended.
2. Immutable state enforcement:
   - Approve proposal, then attempt PATCH.
   - Expect 409 conflict, no content change.
3. Src validation on edit:
   - For src-affected proposal, edit details removing required section heading.
   - Expect 400 with missing-section list.
4. Approval snapshot:
   - Approve edited proposal and inspect record.
   - Expect `approvalSnapshot` populated and stable despite any later file-level operations.
5. Tool path:
   - Invoke `edit_proposal` from agent context on pending proposal.
   - Expect structured success payload and same persisted result as REST path.
6. Build verification:
   - Run `npm run build` and confirm no TypeScript errors.

## Risks and compatibility
- Potential risks:
  - Confusion between source-of-truth proposal payload vs approval snapshot if not clearly named.
  - Race where simultaneous edits could overwrite each other.
- Backward compatibility:
  - Existing proposal files and APIs continue functioning; new fields are additive.
- Mitigations/rollback:
  - Add optimistic version check (optional `expected_version`) to prevent lost updates.
  - Keep edits pending-only to minimize lifecycle complexity.
  - Rollback is straightforward by removing PATCH route/tool and ignoring additive fields.


AFFECTED FILES:
  - [edit] src/gateway/proposals/proposal-store.ts: Add pending-only update function, versioned revision history, and immutable approval snapshot support
  - [edit] src/gateway/routes/proposals.router.ts: Add PATCH /api/proposals/:id endpoint and proposal_updated websocket broadcast
  - [edit] src/gateway/tools/defs/cis-system.ts: Register edit_proposal tool definition with pending-only constraints
  - [edit] src/gateway/agents-runtime/subagent-executor.ts: Implement edit_proposal tool execution path


DIFF PREVIEW / REFERENCE:
```
// proposal-store.ts (conceptual)
export function updatePendingProposal(id, patch, opts) {
  const p = loadProposal(id);
  if (!p) throw notFound;
  if (p.status !== 'pending') throw conflict;
  const next = applyWhitelistedPatch(p, patch);
  const missing = validateSrcProposalDetails(next.details || '', next.affectedFiles || []);
  if (missing.length) throw badRequest;
  next.version = (p.version || 1) + 1;
  next.revisionHistory = [...(p.revisionHistory||[]), { version: next.version, ...opts }];
  saveProposal(next);
  return next;
}

// proposals.router.ts (conceptual)
router.patch('/api/proposals/:id', (req, res) => {
  const updated = updatePendingProposal(req.params.id, req.body.patch, {
    editedBy: req.body.editedBy,
    summary: req.body.editSummary,
  });
  _broadcastFn?.({ type:'proposal_updated', proposalId: updated.id, version: updated.version });
  res.json({ success:true, proposal: updated });
});
```

EXPECTED IMPACT: Eliminates proposal churn for pre-approval refinements, improves auditability, and keeps approved execution immutable and review-safe.

BUILD REQUIRED: Yes — run npm run build after edits. MANDATORY. Stop if build fails — task will pause for assistance.
INSTRUCTIONS:
1. Read affected files with read_source first to understand current state.
2. Apply edits using the src tool matching the edit operation: find_replace_source, replace_lines_source, insert_after_source, delete_lines_source, or write_source (for new src files).
3. Run: run_command({command:"npm run build", shell:true}). If it fails, STOP — do not retry.
4. Report exactly what was changed and any issues encountered.
ADDITIONAL EXECUTOR INSTRUCTIONS:
Execute this as a source-edit implementation task (not analysis). Apply only the listed file edits for pending-proposal editing.

Steps:
1) Read the four affected src files and confirm current create/list/get/approve/deny flow before editing.
2) Implement pending-only update semantics in proposal-store with version/revision history and approval snapshot capture.
3) Add PATCH /api/proposals/:id in proposals.router.ts with deterministic error codes (404/409/400) and proposal_updated broadcast.
4) Register the edit_proposal tool in cis-system.ts and wire its execution case in subagent-executor.ts.
5) Run npm run build. If build fails, stop and report exact errors.
6) Return exact changed files and concise behavior verification for: successful pending edit, blocked post-approval edit, src-details validation.
Proposal ID: prop_1774544820685_9119e0

journal.detail: Completed approved proposal implementation: added pre-approval proposal editing with revision history and immutable approval snapshot in src. Implemented new proposal content/revision types and updatePendingProposal() in src/gateway/proposals/proposal-store.ts with strict pending-only edits, src-details validation on updates, deterministic changed/no-change handling, version increment + revisionHistory append on actual edits, and approvalSnapshot capture (approvedAt, approvedVersion, frozen content snapshot) at approve time. Added PATCH /api/proposals/:id in src/gateway/routes/proposals.router.ts with body/updates parsing, editedBy/note passthrough, deterministic error mapping (404 not found, 409 not pending, 400 validation_failed with missingSections), and proposal_updated websocket broadcast when changed. Wired runtime tool execution in src/gateway/agents-runtime/subagent-executor.ts by adding edit_proposal handler that accepts top-level or nested updates, maps snake_case/camelCase fields, calls updatePendingProposal, returns deterministic ERROR 404/409/400 messages, and emits proposal_updated broadcast with sessionId on successful change. Also confirmed cis-system tool definition includes edit_proposal semantics/params in src/gateway/tools/defs/cis-system.ts (present in source). Verification completed: successful pending edit path, blocked post-approval edit path, src-details validation path, and immutable approval snapshot behavior all confirmed in code. Final build check passed: npm run build -> tsc exit 0.

Step advanced from 6 to 9 via step_complete.

items.text: Read the four affected src files and confirm current create/list/get/approve/deny flow before editing.
Implement pending-only update semantics in proposal-store with version/revision history and approval snapshot capture.
Add PATCH /api/proposals/:id in proposals.router.ts with deterministic error codes (404/409/400) and proposal_updated broadcast.
Register the edit_proposal tool in cis-system.ts and wire its execution case in subagent-executor.ts.
Run npm run build. If build fails, stop and report exact errors.
Return exact changed files and concise behavior verification for: successful pending edit, blocked post-approval edit, src-details validation.
Run npm run build to compile and verify. Stop if build fails.
Log completion: call write_note with a full summary of what was done in this task — what changed, what was created or modified, key results, and any important f

lastToolCall: step_complete({"note":"Logged full task completion note with changed files, behavior verificat)
finalSummary: Step 6–8 are complete. - **Changed files (exact):** - `src/gateway/proposals/proposal-store.ts` - `src/gateway/routes/proposals.router.ts` - `src/gateway/agents-runtime/subagent-executor.ts` - **Behavior verification completed:** - Pending edit succeeds: content diff check, version increment, revision history append, `proposal_updated` broadcast. - Post-approval edit blocked: deterministic `not_pending` path → HTTP `409` / tool `ERROR 409`. - Src-details validation enforced on edits: deterministic validation failure → HTTP `400` with `missingSections` / tool `ERROR 400`. - Immutable approval snapshot confirmed at approval time: captures `approvedAt`, `approvedVersion`, and frozen content snapshot. - **Build verification:** - `npm run build` passed (`tsc` exit 0). - **Completion logging:** - Wrote full `task_complete` note for task `07302699-f356-45e9-b61c-391e8045bb5c`.
